WuZi Gomoku macOS Portable

Recommended usage:
1. Extract WuZiLauncher-macos-v1.1.0.tar.gz
2. Double-click WuZiLauncher.app
3. If macOS blocks the first launch, allow it in System Settings -> Privacy & Security
4. Close the app window directly, or double-click Stop-WuZi.command

Notes:
- This build is now a single-window desktop app instead of a browser launcher
- You can also launch it with Start-WuZi.command
- Requires Node.js or Python 3
- Runtime logs are stored in ~/Library/Application Support/WuZiGomoku
